name: codex-insights
description: Generate evidence-backed Codex session, repo, and workspace reports with deep topic analysis and date-versioned local history.

interface.longDescription: Codex Insights generates localized evidence-backed reports for Codex sessions, repositories, and multi-project workspaces. It supports deep topic analysis, RAG maturity assessment, date-versioned history, and trend comparison.
defaultPrompt: Generate Codex insights for this session
Show this project's Codex trend report
Scan my workspace and analyze RAG maturity
生成本次 Codex 会话洞察分析
